name: SΔϕ-34 — Money, Capital, and Default Power: Cost Editing and Structural Reproduction (v1.0, AI-Readable Package)
description: SΔϕ-34 interprets money and capital through the Sofience–Δϕ framework of default power. Money is defined as generalized cost editing, while capital is defined as structural reproduction of path advantage. This AI-readable package decomposes the canonical paper into operational files for AI ingestion, citation, semantic search, economic path-power diagnosis, rollback reality analysis, exception persistence analysis, default reproduction analysis, and authority-distribution evaluation.
